user.title: Siemens Logo Modbus
user.description:
Configure your Siemens Logo! 8.4. Set a count to 0 to disable that address space.

This integration was fully generated with Claude (Anthropic).

data.enable_m_selector: Enable M10-M14 decimal selector (drives slave Logo)

data_description.refresh_interval: How often Home Assistant polls the Logo (1–10 s)
data_description.input_count: Number of physical digital inputs wired (I1–I24)
data_description.output_count: Number of physical digital outputs wired (Q1–Q20)
data_description.m_count: Number of internal memory coils to expose (M1–M64)
data_description.v_count: Number of V flag bits to expose (V0.0–V850.7)
data_description.vw_count: Number of analog memory word registers (VW1–VW425)
data_description.enable_nq: Each bit of AQ1 (byte) maps to NQ1-NQ8, AQ2 maps to NQ9-NQ16. Requires AQ count ≥ 2.
data_description.enable_m_selector: Exposes a number entity (0-31) that writes M10-M14 as individual coils. Value auto-resets to 0 after 1 second.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Logo. Check the IP address, port, and that Modbus TCP is enabled on the Logo.
